sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the image, the right green box moved LEFT and is now back near its original position between the panels. The left green box's center changed from W to c (dark gray) due to the click.
Now the right green box is controllable. Let me check its exact position and try moving UP to see if it can go above the panels.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Green objects:")
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")
        for cid in n['children']:
            c = next(x for x in seg if x['id'] == cid)
            print(f"    center: color={c['color']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The right green box is at cols 27-29, rows 30-32. The center is W (white). The left green box is at cols 12-14, rows 33-35, with center c.
Now let me try moving the right green box UP. The panels go from rows 21-41. The gap between the left panel and purple bar is at cols 24-32 (approximately). If the green box moves UP, it should go to rows 27-29, then 24-26, then 21-23, and then be blocked at row 21 (the top of the panels).
But wait, the green box needs to go ABOVE the panels to get to the right side. The panels are at rows 21-41. Above the panels would be rows 0-20. So the green box needs to move UP until it's above row 21.
Currently at rows 30-32. Moving UP 3 times would get it to rows 21-23, then the 4th UP would try to go to rows 18-20, which is above the panels.
But the gap is between the left panel (cols 9-23) and the purple bar (cols 33-38). The green box is at cols 27-29, which is in the gap. So it should be able to move UP through the gap.
Let me try moving UP multiple times to get above the panels.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Right green box at rows 30-32, cols 27-29
# Panels top at row 21, so need to move UP to get above row 21
# From row 30, need 3 UP to reach row 21, then 1 more to be above
# Let's try 4 UP actions
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
